name: Captrix editor load and controls
description: Smoke test for the deployed Captrix studio shell and primary controls.

planSteps.description: The page shows Captrix AI and data-testid=project-status is visible.
data-testid=video-stage, data-testid=video-input, data-testid=generate-captions, data-testid=caption-size, data-testid=export-kit, and data-testid=reset-studio are visible.
data-testid=studio-preset-viral, data-testid=studio-preset-hook, data-testid=studio-preset-wide, and data-testid=studio-preset-feed are visible.
